scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:blockchain" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.deploy:local: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network localhost
scripts.deploy:sepolia: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network sepolia
scripts.seed:local: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/seed.ts --network localhost
